title: Principal Fleet Manager at Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Principal Fleet Manager at Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Fleet Manager looking for your next big career move? Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates:
Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express Asia Pacific Associates!
